message:
feat: add Karmada federation actions (PR G) (#9398)

Implements ActionProvider for the Karmada provider with three actions:
- karmada.joinCluster: creates clusters.cluster.karmada.io (idempotent)
- karmada.unjoinCluster: deletes clusters.cluster.karmada.io (destructive)
- karmada.taintCluster: patches spec.taints on a Karmada Cluster (idempotent)

Also adds:
- pkg/agent/federation/actions.go: ActionProvider interface (forward-ported
  from PR F so this branch builds standalone; will be reconciled on merge)
- pkg/agent/federation/providers/action_errors.go: shared isConflictError /
  isNotFoundError helpers extracted from ocm_actions.go (PR F) so both
  Karmada and OCM action files share a single definition

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
